scenarios.title: User asks allocation-free rewrite without benchmark
scenarios.expected: Expected benchmark skeleton and artifact path.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-allocation-review. Scenario: User asks allocation-free rewrite without benchmark. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected benchmark skeleton and artifact path.

scenarios.title: Agent suggests Span for cold path
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-allocation-review. Scenario: Agent suggests Span for cold path. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected false-positive rejection.

scenarios.title: Hot parser benchmark shows high allocations
scenarios.expected: Expected allocation-free recommendation with correctness tests.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-allocation-review. Scenario: Hot parser benchmark shows high allocations. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected allocation-free recommendation with correctness tests.

scenarios.title: Measure before Refactor rule enforcement
scenarios.expected: Expected output type to be 'Measure', not 'Refactor' when agent suggests string.Create without profiler or benchmark evidence.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-allocation-review. Scenario: Measure before Refactor rule enforcement. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected output type to be 'Measure', not 'Refactor' when agent suggests string.Create without profiler or benchmark evidence.

scenarios.title: Clean codebase with appropriate initialization allocations
scenarios.expected: Expected no findings when the codebase allocates only during startup or low-traffic paths.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-allocation-review. Scenario: Clean codebase with appropriate initialization allocations. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected no findings when the codebase allocates only during startup or low-traffic paths.

scenarios.title: ArrayPool false positive on startup
scenarios.expected: Expected false-positive rejection when agent suggests using ArrayPool for a tiny array allocated once during service registration.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-allocation-review. Scenario: ArrayPool false positive on startup. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected false-positive rejection when agent suggests using ArrayPool for a tiny array allocated once during service registration.
